name: How does Truecaller work in iPhone?
snippet: With Truecaller on your iPhone, unwanted calls are identified instantly, giving you the power to decide whether to pick up or let it go.

name: Hiya: Spam Blocker & Caller ID - App Store - Apple
snippet: Free · iOS Hiya blocks spam and scam calls, and displays caller ID name and call reason on incoming calls. Want to supercharge your Hiya app? Try our Premium features.

name: Anyone using Hiya or Truecaller to block spam calls or texts?
snippet: The Truecaller app is one of the best free apps for blocking. Blocking the actual numbers seems pointless due to them likely being hijacked or spoofed.
